A contact's preferred payment method can be set so that when a payment is created for that contact, the payment method is automatically selected by default.
To set a preferred Payment Method for a customer
or a vendor
go to Accounting --> Customers --> Customers
Accounting --> Vendors --> Vendors

Vendors --> Vendors
select the customer or vendor. In the Sales & Purchase tab of the contact form

Payments matching or Auto-reconcile tool allows reconciling journal items with each other
Payments matching or Auto-reconcile tool allows reconciling journal items with each other
To use the Auto-Reconcile feature, follow these steps
Access the Accounting Dashboard, click the ellipsis button from the Customer Invoices or Vendor Bills journals
Access the Accounting Dashboard, click the ellipsis button from the Customer Invoices or Vendor Bills journals
Access the Accounting Dashboard, click the ellipsis button from the Customer Invoices or Vendor Bills journals, and select Payments Matching
Alternatively, go to Accounting --> Accounting --> Reconcile
To manually Reconcile journal items, select the individual items from the list view and click Reconcile
In the Reconcile automatically window, click Reconcile
In the Reconcile Automatically window, set the Reconcile field
Perfect Match: Each debit journal item will be matched with the corresponding credit journal item of the same value
Perfect Match: Each debit journal item will be matched with the corresponding credit journal item of the same value
Clear Accounts: All reconciled journal items will have the same matching number
set the Reconcile field depending on how you want to match journal items: Perfect Match
set the Reconcile field depending on how you want to match journal items: Clear Accounts
Invoices and bills are automatically matched to their corresponding payments
Invoices and bills are automatically matched to their corresponding payments
marked as In payment until they are reconciled with their corresponding bank transactions

heading: Registering payments on multiple invoices/credit notes or bills/refunds (group payments)

relations.evidence: select the relevant invoices... and click Pay
the contact's preferred Payment Method is automatically selected
the Amount is automatically set based on the installment amounts defined by the payment term
The invoices or bills are then marked as In payment
until they are reconciled with the bank transactions

Batch payments allow grouping payments from multiple customers
They are also useful when depositing checks
or cash payments to the bank
or for generating bank payment files
such as SEPA
or NACHA
.. seealso:: payments/batch
The Payments matching tool opens all unreconciled journal items and allows them to be processed individually, matching all payments and journal items.
